# foundry_enrollment (Resource)

Manages a Foundry Enrollment.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the Enrollment.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the Enrollment.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Identifier of the Enrollment.
